stemHtml: An ATC unit, maintaining two-way communication with the traffic operating on the frequency, fails to establish normal communication with a specific aircraft. What is the most appropriate action for the ATC to take in this circumstance?

options.a: Call the specific aircraft on the secondary frequency.
options.c: Use other aircraft as a relay on the current frequency.
options.d: Use the HF band, because it has a greater effective range.
